item.title: PRP Treatment Dubai 699 AED | Hair & Face Platelet Rich Plasma (PRP) Therapy | Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: Vitiligo Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai. Vitiligo (vit-ih-LIE-go) is a disease that causes loss of skin color in patches. The discolored areas usually get bigger with time. The condition can affect the skin on any part of the body. It can also affect hair and the inside of the mouth.

item.title: Warts Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai | Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: There are many treatment options for warts, although often warts reappear after treatment, and sometimes multiple types of treatment are necessary. We at Cosmocare provide the following kind of treatment for removal of Warts under the guidance of our certified trained Dermatologist Dr. Murtuza Bandukwala.

item.title: Acne Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: Acne is a general term for eruptive skin disease. There are many types of acne including blackheads, whiteheads, papules, pustules, and cystic. Acne generally occurs in teenagers and young adults, Sometimes it is resistant in adult females due to hormonal changes and persistent though it can affect anyone.

item.title: Fungal Infection by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: When the patient comes to Cosmocare, our certified dermatologist Dr Murtuza Bandukwala diagnoses fungal skin infections through physical examination, review of medical history and investigations.

item.title: Pigmentation / Skin Discoloration Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai | Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: There are many treatment options for warts, although often warts reappear after treatment, and sometimes multiple types of treatment are necessary. item.title: Allergy Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: What is an allergic reaction? In the event of an allergy, your immune system will mistake a normally harmless substance for something that is dangerous to your body. This reaction will cause your immune system to produce antibodies called “immunoglobulin E” (IgE), which attack the “danger” to protect you.

item.title: Rosacea Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: The treatment of rosacea depends on the nature of disease and the present situation of the person’s skin. . Our internationally acclaimed Dermatologist Dr Murtuza Bandukwala can help you determine which method is best for you.

item.description: A quality-switched laser (Q-Switched) is a non-invasive laser that creates high-intensity pulsed beam light. Our Expert Dermatologist Dr Murtuza Bandukwala, depending upon the condition of the patient decides the mode of treatment.

item.title: Tattoo Removal by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: At Cosmocare, our expert and certified dermatologist Dr Murtuza Bandukwala, uses the most advanced laser tattoo removal technology to remove the unwanted tattoos..

item.title: Chemical peel Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai | Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: Chemical peel is a beneficial treatment for wrinkles, skin discoloration. After examining the condition of the patient, our expert dermatologist Dr Murtuza Bandukwala decides which kind of peel will be used.

item.title: Hyperhidrosis (Excessive Sweating) Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai | Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: There are many treatment options for sufferers of hyperhidrosis. At our clinic we will help you determine what method is best for you. There are several types of oral medications used to control hyperhidrosis. Anticholinergics, for example, block nerve impulses to sweat glands, thereby blocking sweat output.

item.title: IPL Intense Pulse Technology in Dubai | Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: We at Cosmocare Medical Center use IPL Intense Pulse Technology to provide treatment for, Age Spots, Rosacea, Acne, Sun spots, Acne Scars, Hair Removal, Skin Pigmentation, Thread veins. Our Certified and renowned dermatologist Dr Murtuza Bandukwala has used this technology to treat various patients and the results have been satisfactory.

item.title: 249aed STD / HIV Testing and Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| by Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: Cosmocare Medical Center (sexual health clinic) offer STI Hiv testing in Dubai. Having a test is simple and painless. If you have an STI? Our doctor will talk with you about the infection and if there is a need for further tests and the sort of treatments involved.

item.title: Genital Herpes Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: Genital herpes is a common sexually transmitted disease (STD) that any sexually active person can get. Most people with the virus don’t have symptoms. Even without signs of the disease, herpes can still be spread to sex partners.

item.title: Chlamydia Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai| Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: chlamydia Treatment by Specialist Doctor in Dubai. Chlamydia is a common sexually transmitted disease (STD) that any sexually active person can get. Most people with the virus don’t have symptoms. Even without signs of the disease, herpes can still be spread to sex partners.

item.title: Comprehensive Cancer Screening in Dubai by Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: Screening can help doctors find and treat several types of cancer early, before they cause symptoms. Early detection is important because when abnormal tissue or cancer is found early, it may be easier to treat. By the time symptoms appear, cancer may have begun to spread and be harder to treat.

item.description: Medical treatment for varicose veins may not be necessary if there are no symptoms, but surgical and nonsurgical approaches are available. Find out here from Cosmocare Medical Center about the general information and conditions of a varicose veins surgery.

item.title: Anal Fissure Surgery in Dubai | Fissure Treatment Specialist Doctor by Dermatology, Laser hair Removal, Mole Removal Dental Cosmocare Medical Center
item.description: An anal fissure is a tear in the skin lining the inside of the anus which can be caused by constipation. If a fissure does not heal on its own, surgical treatment can help. Find out here from Cosmocare Medical Center about the general information and conditions of a ANAL FISSURE surgery.
